intent: Pin the simplified Overview contract: only Trust Pulse, Simple Flow, Top 3 (or fail-closed), and (optional) Explain System State. Top 10/All move to Prioritization tab; Maturity moves to Maturity tab; Roadmap stays in Roadmap tab.

cases.description: Overview must contain at most 4 sections (Trust Pulse, Simple Flow, Top 3, optional Explain).
cases.actual_outcome: verified by DashboardPage.test.tsx:'overview shows only allowed sections' and Met03Panels.test.tsx:'keeps overview concise with at most 4 operator panels'

cases.description: Leverage Queue must NOT render in Overview; Roadmap tab carries the full 4-queue view.
cases.expected_outcome: no leverage-queue-item in overview-tab; roadmap-full-queues present in roadmap-tab.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by DashboardPage.test.tsx:'leverage queue does NOT render in overview' and 'roadmap tab renders the leverage queue full 4-queue view'

cases.description: Top 10 + Full active list render in Prioritization tab, not Overview.
cases.expected_outcome: Prioritization tab shows top10 + full lists; Overview shows only Top 3.

cases.description: Maturity table renders in Maturity tab.
cases.expected_outcome: tab-maturity present; maturity-table renders rows when /api/maturity returns ok.

cases.description: Overview must remain usable on mobile (single-column flow, padded panels).
cases.expected_outcome: Panel uses p-3 sm:p-6 spacing; main wrapper preserves max-w-full overflow-x-hidden.
cases.actual_outcome: Confirmed in apps/dashboard-3ls/app/page.tsx <main className='p-3 sm:p-6 space-y-4 max-w-full overflow-x-hidden'>

fixes_applied.rationale: Removed Leverage Queue from Overview; added Maturity and MVP tabs; replaced Prioritization JSON dump with structured Top 10 + Full lists; freshness gate banner added to Top 3 panel.
Updated existing tests to reflect leverage-queue relocation; added registry-contract / maturity / decision-layer / explain-state mock routes so the simplified Overview tests pass.
